SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlottery

Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlottery.Event
public class Event extends Object
Model for an event in the Event Lottery system. Maps to Firestore document at events/{eventId}; waiting list is subcollection events/{eventId}/waitingList/{deviceId}.

Note: getUserApplicationStatus() / setUserApplicationStatus(String) are for local UI only (e.g. EntrantHistoryScreenActivity); do not persist to Firestore.

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Event()
    No-arg constructor; selectionCriteria initialized to empty list.

    Full constructor for event data (excluding promoCode, posterUri, selectionCriteria).

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event()
      No-arg constructor; selectionCriteria initialized to empty list.

    • Event

      public Event(String eventId, String title, String description, String location, String organizerId, String organizerName, int capacity, int waitingListLimit, long registrationStartMillis, long registrationEndMillis, long eventDateMillis, boolean geolocationRequired, double price)
      Full constructor for event data (excluding promoCode, posterUri, selectionCriteria). selectionCriteria is set to an empty list.

  • Method Details

    • isRegistrationOpen

      public boolean isRegistrationOpen()
      Whether the current time falls within the registration window.
      Returns:
      true if now is between registrationStartMillis and registrationEndMillis (inclusive)
